'''âng-ng-m''' ('''kangangam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pugger|pugger]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pugger|pugger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-ng-m
|-
! Lemma
| kangangam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingangam|thingangam]] || [[word:jingangam|jingangam]] || [[word:shingangam|shingangam]] || [[word:kingangam|kingangam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungangam|thuthungangam]] || [[word:jujungangam|jujungangam]] || [[word:shushungangam|shushungangam]] || [[word:kukungangam|kukungangam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungangam|thungangam]] || [[word:jungangam|jungangam]] || [[word:shungangam|shungangam]] || [[word:kungangam|kungangam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungangam|thungangam]] || [[word:jungangam|jungangam]] || [[word:shungangam|shungangam]] || [[word:kungangam|kungangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengangam|thengangam]] || [[word:jengangam|jengangam]] || [[word:shengangam|shengangam]] || [[word:kengangam|kengangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongangam|thothongangam]] || [[word:jojongangam|jojongangam]] || [[word:shoshongangam|shoshongangam]] || [[word:kokongangam|kokongangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongangam|thongangam]] || [[word:jongangam|jongangam]] || [[word:shongangam|shongangam]] || [[word:kongangam|kongangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongangam|thongangam]] || [[word:jongangam|jongangam]] || [[word:shongangam|shongangam]] || [[word:kongangam|kongangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngangam|thĂŠngangam]] || [[word:jĂŠngangam|jĂŠngangam]] || [[word:shĂŠngangam|shĂŠngangam]] || [[word:kĂŠngangam|kĂŠngangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangangam|thathangangam]] || [[word:jajangangam|jajangangam]] || [[word:shashangangam|shashangangam]] || [[word:kakangangam|kakangangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangangam|thangangam]] || [[word:jangangam|jangangam]] || [[word:shangangam|shangangam]] || [[word:kangangam|kangangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangangam|thangangam]] || [[word:jangangam|jangangam]] || [[word:shangangam|shangangam]] || [[word:kangangam|kangangam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangangam|shangangam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangangam|goshangangam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangangam|gokishangangam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangangamnĂŒ|shangangamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangangamnknĂŒ|goshangangamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangangamnĂŒ|gokishangangamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangangamshĂ«|shangangamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangangamnkshĂ«|goshangangamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangangamshĂ«|gokishangangamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangangamro|shangangamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangangamnkro|goshangangamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangangamro|gokishangangamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangangamu|shangangamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangangamnkmu|goshangangamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangangamu|gokishangangamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangangamsher|shangangamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangangamnksher|goshangangamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangangamsher|gokishangangamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangangamng|shangangamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangangamnkng|goshangangamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangangamng|gokishangangamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangangamya|shangangamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangangamnkya|goshangangamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangangamya|gokishangangamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangangamyam|shangangamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangangamnkyam|goshangangamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangangamyam|gokishangangamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangangamnĂŒshĂ«|shangangamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangangamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangangamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangangamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangangamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangangamnĂŒro|shangangamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangangamnknĂŒro|goshangangamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangangamnĂŒro|gokishangangamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangangamnĂŒmu|shangangamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangangamnknĂŒmu|goshangangamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangangamnĂŒmu|gokishangangamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangangamshĂ«nĂŒ|shangangamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangangamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangangamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangangamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangangamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangangamshĂ«ro|shangangamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangangamnkshĂ«ro|goshangangamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangangamshĂ«ro|gokishangangamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangangamshĂ«mu|shangangamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangangamnkshĂ«mu|goshangangamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangangamshĂ«mu|gokishangangamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangangamronĂŒ|shangangamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangangamnkronĂŒ|goshangangamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangangamronĂŒ|gokishangangamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangangamroshĂ«|shangangamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangangamnkroshĂ«|goshangangamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangangamroshĂ«|gokishangangamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangangamromu|shangangamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangangamnkromu|goshangangamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangangamromu|gokishangangamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangangamunĂŒ|shangangamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangangamnkmunĂŒ|goshangangamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangangamunĂŒ|gokishangangamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangangamushĂ«|shangangamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangangamnkmushĂ«|goshangangamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangangamushĂ«|gokishangangamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangangamuro|shangangamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangangamnkmuro|goshangangamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangangamuro|gokishangangamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
